summary: BUG VERIFIED: Dropdown Quick Create Display - After creating new master (category/unit/brand/supplier) from Item Form, the new item does NOT appear in dropdown and is NOT auto-selected. Toast shows success but dropdown stays at placeholder.

ui_bugs.issue: New category created via quick create does NOT appear in dropdown list and is NOT auto-selected
ui_bugs.expected: After quick create, new item should appear in dropdown AND be auto-selected
ui_bugs.actual: Toast shows 'Kategori Baru berhasil!' but dropdown shows 'Pilih Kategori', item NOT in list

ui_bugs.issue: 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error appears when duplicate name
ui_bugs.expected: Proper error handling for duplicate names
ui_bugs.actual: Generic JSON parse error shown instead of user-friendly duplicate message

integration_issues.flow: Quick Create Category in Item Form
integration_issues.issue: localCategories state not being updated, useMemo not triggering re-render with new option
integration_issues.root_cause_analysis: The handleQuickCreateSuccess in ItemFormModal calls setLocalCategories but the new item does NOT appear in categoryOptions. Either: 1) onItemCreated callback not being called, 2) setLocalCategories not triggering re-render, 3) useMemo not recomputing

action_items: DEBUG: Add console.log in ItemFormModal.handleQuickCreateSuccess to verify callback is being called
FIX: Verify onItemCreated prop is correctly passed through SearchableSelectWithCreate
FIX: Check if React batching is preventing state updates from triggering re-render
FIX: Consider using flushSync or useLayoutEffect to force immediate state update
FIX: The '50ms setTimeout' in SearchableSelectWithCreate may not be sufficient - try increasing or using different approach
critical_code_review_comments: QuickCreateModal.jsx line 356-379: handleQuickCreateSuccess calls onItemCreated then setTimeout(onValueChange, 50ms) - the 50ms may not be enough for React to re-render
ItemFormModal.jsx line 73-98: handleQuickCreateSuccess should add to localCategories but new item NOT appearing in categoryOptions
ItemFormModal.jsx line 566: onValueChange uses {...formData, category_id} instead of functional update - potential stale closure issue
Consider using flushSync from react-dom to force synchronous state update before selecting value

success_rate.frontend: 0% - Core bug NOT fixed, quick create auto-select not working

seed_data_creation: Test categories created: T-17736130736475, T-17736131578919, TEST-CAT-DISPLAY-1773612916, TEST-CAT-1773612956
context_for_next_testing_agent: The quick create feature is NOT working. Toast shows success but: 1) New item does not appear in dropdown list, 2) New item is not auto-selected. The main agent's fix (reordering onItemCreated before onValueChange with setTimeout) did not resolve the issue. Need to debug why localCategories state update is not triggering useMemo recomputation for categoryOptions.

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: After quick create category, dropdown shows 'Pilih Kategori' instead of new category name
observed_behavior: Toast 'Kategori Baru berhasil!' appears - API call succeeded
When dropdown opened, new category NOT in list
code_flow: 7. BUT: New item not appearing in categoryOptions useMemo
potential_root_causes: onItemCreated callback may not be properly connected
useMemo dependencies not detecting localCategories change
rca_of_the_issue.suggested_fix: Add debugging logs first to trace exactly where the flow breaks. Then consider using flushSync or removing useMemo to force synchronous rendering.

tests_performed: Login and navigate to Master Data > Items > Tambah Item
Click category dropdown > + Tambah Kategori Baru
Create test category with unique name
Verify dropdown auto-selects new category - FAILED
Verify new category appears in dropdown list - FAILED
